section.heading: Definitions
section.chapeau: For the purposes of this title: 11 See References in Text note below.

paragraph.content: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
The term “Indian tribe” means any Indian or Alaska Native tribe, band, nation, pueblo, village or community that the Secretary of the Interior acknowledges to exist as an Indian tribe.
The term “list” means the list of recognized tribes published by the Secretary pursuant to section 5131 of this title.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This title, referred to in introductory provisions, is title I of Pub. L. 103–454, Nov. 2, 1994, 108 Stat. 4791, which enacted this section, section 5131 of this title, and provisions set out as a note below. For complete classification of this title to the Code, see Short Title of 1994 Amendment note set out under section 5101 of this title and Tables.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 479a of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Short Title
note.p: For short title of this section and section 5131 of this title as the “Federally Recognized Indian Tribe List Act of 1994”, see section 101 of Pub. L. 103–454, set out as a note under section 5101 of this title.

note.heading: Congressional Findings
